testcase.name: test_register_new_user_sets_cookies_and_bootstraps_workspace
testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:60: in test_register_new_user_sets_cookies_and_bootstraps_workspace assert data["email"] == email E AssertionError: assert 'test_caba587...oyhub-test.io' == 'TEST_caba587...oyhub-test.io' E E - TEST_caba5876@deployhub-test.io E ? ^^^^ E + test_caba5876@deployhub-test.io E ? ^^^^

testcase.name: test_register_duplicate_email_rejected
testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:73: in test_register_duplicate_email_rejected assert r.status_code == 400 E assert 422 == 400 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_brute_force_lockout_returns_429

failure.message: AssertionError: expected 429 after 5 wrong logins, got 401 assert 401 == 429 + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:93: in test_brute_force_lockout_returns_429 assert last.status_code == 429, f"expected 429 after 5 wrong logins, got {last.status_code}" E AssertionError: expected 429 after 5 wrong logins, got 401 E assert 401 == 429 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_get_delete_project

failure.message: AssertionError: Internal Server Error assert 500 in (200, 201) + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:129: in test_create_get_delete_project assert r.status_code in (200, 201), r.text E AssertionError: Internal Server Error E assert 500 in (200, 201) E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
